data.markdown:
Learn how AI can help improve the learning experience as your business grows. March 17 @ 10am PT / 1pm ET [Save my seat](https://www.thinkific.com/webinars/webinar-personalization-at-scale)

×

# Powering the world’s top learning businesses

Thinkific is an online course platform that helps you create, market, and sell learning products in one place. Build courses with a drag-and-drop editor, add communities and memberships, and accept payments instantly.

[Talk to sales](https://www.thinkific.com/plus/plus-customer-enquiries/)

[Start free trial](https://courses.thinkific.com/signup?plan=low_22&interval=month)

![Jacques Wong - Thinkific User](https://www.thinkific.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/07/Jacques-wong.webp)

Trusted by over 35,000 customers

![](https://www.thinkific.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/05/leavitt-logo.png)

## Learning experiences that convert on a   platform that scales with you

Whether you’re selling your personal expertise, scaling an academy, or using online education to expand your company’s revenue, Thinkific equips you with the tools and support you need. Create lasting value, engage with audiences, generate recurring revenue, and evolve your business at every stage.

### An easy-to-use platform to help you launch faster

Get up and running quickly with AI-powered content and design tools, a simple drag-and-drop course builder, and content with tips and insights from successful customers.

[Explore case studies](https://www.thinkific.com/case-studies/)

### Industry-leading commerce and payment tools

Growth doesn’t have to be forced – it can be built into the very fabric of the learning journey. Our platform creates natural, high-value upsell and cross-sell moments with seamless commerce tools.

[Explore selling tools](https://www.thinkific.com/features/selling-tools/)

![Customer support](https://www.thinkific.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/05/FH_Image-Containor-4.png)

### Unrivaled customer support

From onboarding services to problem resolution, our team is built to be your biggest growth asset. That dedication earned us a top 50 G2 award for customer service — based on customer reviews.

[Learn more about support](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us)

## The right learning products for your customers

From online courses and communities to memberships and digital downloads, Thinkific is the platform that supports every way you want to share and scale your expertise.

### How teams win with Thinkific

Unlocked **486% revenue growth** by turning in-person education into a scalable global program using Thinkific Plus

Reached **100,000+ enrollments across 20+ countries** by building structured learning paths, credentials, and offline access on Thinkific Plus

Built a **six-figure online academy** by packaging real-world expertise into structured courses and programs on Thinkific

![](https://www.thinkific.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/01/g2-top50-customerservice-2025.svg)

![](https://www.thinkific.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/01/g2-leader-winter2026.png)![](https://www.thinkific.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/G2users-love-us.png)

![](https://www.thinkific.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/G2BestSoftware2026-Badge-Persona-EducationProducts.png)

### The results speak for themselves

**4.5/5** from over **393** real reviews on

**G2**

We don’t ask you to take our word for it—we let the data do the talking. These awards are fueled by 380 real-world reviews, making us one of the highest-rated solutions for 2025. G2’s rigorous ranking system ensures that only the most reliable, high-impact products make the cut.

## Thinkific’s stand-out suite of features

![Thinkific product shot of courses](https://www.thinkific.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/06/home-features-courses-1.png)

![Thinkific product shot of selling tools](https://www.thinkific.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/06/home-features-transactions-1.png)

![Thinkific product shot of analytics](https://www.thinkific.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/06/home-features-engagement-1.png)

![Thinkific product shot of courses](https://www.thinkific.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/06/home-features-courses-1.png)

Build high-quality learning experiences

From online communities to engaging courses, you have the tools and support you need to customize and sell powerful learning experiences exactly the way you want — no developer experience needed.

Unlimited courses and digital downloads

Unlimited websites, landing pages, and custom domains

AI-powered content creation

Built-in AI teaching assistant to drive learner satisfaction

SCORM-compliant LMS

Customized learning paths

[Compare plans](https://www.thinkific.com/pricing/)

![Thinkific product shot of selling tools](https://www.thinkific.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/06/home-features-transactions-1.png)

Selling tools: Sell more with ease

Earn more revenue with smart selling features on TCommerce, our built-in selling and payment solution designed for maximum conversion. **TCommerce users sell up to 31% more!**

B2B selling features like Group Orders and Invoicing

Multiple payment options

Upsell tools like coupons and order bumps

Sale recovery features like failed payment and abandoned cart emails

Automatic tax collection and remittance for U.S. and Canadian sales

Simplified tax management for your sales in the EU and UK

[See selling features](https://www.thinkific.com/features/selling-tools/)

![Thinkific product shot of analytics](https://www.thinkific.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/06/home-features-engagement-1.png)

Analytics: Measure performance that matters

Our advanced analytics tools underpin your learning business, surfacing important, actionable insights that allow you and your customers to drive more meaningful results. Track learner value, marketing strategies, and revenue growth to see where you can deliver more relevant offerings.

Advanced analytics

Custom dashboards to track student engagement and revenue

Automatically scheduled reports to stakeholders

Unlimited roles and permissions

[Explore analytics features](https://www.thinkific.com/features/analytics/)

## Launch in 30 days with    zero setup fees

Thinkific Plus customers can get up and running in as little as 30 days thanks to

AI-powered content creation tools, a user-friendly interface, and 1:1 onboarding and launch support.

[Talk to sales](https://www.thinkific.com/plus/plus-customer-enquiries/)

[Start free trial](https://courses.thinkific.com/signup?plan=low_22&interval=month)

![Guy Marion, Chief Marketing Officer of Chargebee](https://www.thinkific.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/05/image-1041.png)

“Thinkific offers exceptional scalability, enabling businesses to grow their course offerings and student base without any limitations. It can handle unlimited courses, students, and bandwidth, ensuring businesses can expand their e-learning offerings without worrying about technical constraints.”

Guy Marion

Chief Marketing Officer

[Read Chargebee’s case study](https://www.thinkific.com/case-studies/chargebee/)

## Join the ranks of leading learning businesses

### How Flashpoint educated 3,000+ users and enhanced product adoption

“Using Thinkific Plus has allowed us to employ our customer education at scale. Without Thinkific Plus, it would have taken an immense amount of resources to train our user base.”

– Grace Tilmont, Flashpoint.io

[Read Flashpoint’s case study](https://www.thinkific.com/case-studies/flashpoint/)

### From tired biochem major to seven-figure earner

“I like that I can put my own branding on my Thinkific courses. I can change my fonts, the background color, and other aspects \[of the course\] so my students still feel like they’re on my website.” – Senna Filter, Easily Excel

[Read Easily Excel’s case study](https://www.thinkific.com/case-studies/easily-excel-success-story/)

### How Chef Amanda Schonberg helps bakers make $1,000 per day

“Fast forward now and I’m blessed to have two, six-figure businesses.” – Amanda Schonberg, Baking for Business

[Read Baking for Business’ case study](https://www.thinkific.com/case-studies/baking-business-success-story/)

![Chef Amanda Schonberg](https://www.thinkific.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/05/image-7.png)

### How Schudio manages 50,000 enrolments

“We decided we didn’t want to be constrained by limitations. I chose Thinkific Plus because of the API access. It gave us the ability to go as far as we wanted to.”- Ian Richardson, Schudio

[Read Schudio’s case study](https://www.thinkific.com/case-studies/schudio/)

![Portrait of Ian Richardson](https://www.thinkific.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/05/image-1045.png)

## The best businesses build on Thinkific

35K+

businesses supported

$3.7B

earned by customers

### Courses. Community. Commerce.  We do them better.

We can help you launch and sell online learning experiences that drive revenue and retention.

Talk to one of our team members today.

[Talk to sales](https://www.thinkific.com/plus/plus-customer-enquiries/)

[Start free trial](https://courses.thinkific.com/signup?plan=low_22&interval=month)

![](https://www.thinkific.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/G2BestSoftware2026-Badge-Global-Canadian.png)![](https://www.thinkific.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/G2BestSoftware2026-Badge-Persona-EducationProducts.png)![](https://www.thinkific.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/05/TrustRadius-BuyersChoice-2026.png)![](https://www.thinkific.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/G2users-love-us.png)![](https://www.thinkific.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/05/g2-momentum-leader-2026.png)
